summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 21 warning, 12 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs — `--no-simplify` flag not forwarded to inner loop (SPEC.md L45 requires it)
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:188 — `simplifyPass` in STATE.json missing `tokens` field per SPEC
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:26 — Hardcoded `"main"` in merge-base; repos using `master` silently skip the pass
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:333 — `--no-simplify` test simulates guard logic inline, doesn't test actual run.mjs code path
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:173 — Fix-loop re-verify mock returns static diff; can't detect stale-diff bugs

🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:26 — Hardcoded `"main"` branch with no `master` fallback; repos using other default branches silently skip the simplify pass. A "falls back to master" test once existed (visible in task-2 artifact) but was lost during the rewrite.
🟡 tasks/task-1/handshake.json:7 — Builder claimed "601 tests pass" but artifact shows 587. Handshake test count inflated by 14 (builder hallucination).
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:166 — Silent `catch { break }` on re-verify dispatch asymmetric with fix dispatch which logs the error. Missing diagnostic log.
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:333 — `--no-simplify` test simulates guard logic inline instead of exercising production code. Carried from prior reviews — backlog item.
🟡 tasks/task-2/handshake.json:7 — Handshake claims 601 tests but artifact shows 590. Zero-fail count is accurate; total is stale. Backlog: enforce consistency.
🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:1526` — No integration test for `simplifyBlocked → finalize blocked` — highest-risk untested path
🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:333` — `--no-simplify` test duplicates conditional instead of testing real code path
🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:308` — Role-file-missing test doesn't exercise the catch branch
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:163` — Re-verify dispatch failure path untested
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:155` — Diff-becomes-empty-after-fixes path untested
🟡 `tasks/task-{1,2}/artifacts/test-output.txt` — Stale artifacts from earlier builds with different API
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:121 — Fail-open paths write no persistent audit trail; post-hoc analysis can't distinguish clean pass from bypassed gate
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:181 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards eval file write errors
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:198 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards STATE.json write errors
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:26 — Hardcoded `"main"` with no `master` fallback silently skips pass on repos using master
| 🔴 Critical | 0 | — |
| 🟡 Warning | 2 | Test quality issues (both carried from prior reviews) |
